rules: R-01: UPGRADE action costs (generatorLevel * config.upgradeBaseCost). If energy >= cost, energy -= cost and generatorLevel += 1.
R-02: COOL action costs config.coolCost. If energy >= cost, energy -= cost and heat = max(0, heat - config.coolAmount).
R-03: WAIT action has no immediate state change other than triggering the turn end.
R-04: End-of-Turn Heat: heat += (generatorLevel * config.heatMultiplier). This increase affects throttling on the NEXT turn only — never the current turn (thermal inertia).

R-05: End-of-Turn Energy — the throttle is decided by the heat AFTER this turn's actions (so a COOL this turn relieves throttling immediately) but BEFORE R-04's passive heat increase this turn: compute energy first, then apply R-04. baseProd = (generatorLevel * config.energyMultiplier). If (heat, measured after actions and before R-04) > config.heatThreshold, actualProd = floor(baseProd * config.throttleMultiplier), else actualProd = baseProd. energy += actualProd.
R-06: Win Condition: If energy >= config.winCondition, status = 'WON'.
R-07: Stall Condition: If status != 'WON' AND actualProd == 0 AND energy < min(config.coolCost, generatorLevel * config.upgradeBaseCost), status = 'STALLED'.

files.description: CLI entry point. Handles --scenario N and pipes inputs to the engine.
Core deterministic logic. Contains the state machine and rule processors.
